untranslatable_reason: Signal references 8MA (sma_8) and 20MA (sma_20) but only sma_5, sma_10, sma_20, sma_40+ are in the allowed indicator list. The 8-period moving average is not available. Uptrend detection via 'An uptrend is in progress' requires regime filtering or ADX-based confirmation not explicitly provided in signal.
translation_notes: Attempted to map 8MA to closest available indicator, but sma_8 does not exist in allowed list. Signal intent captured using sma_10 as proxy for fast MA, but this deviates from original 8MA specification. Exit condition inferred as price closing below the 8MA line (reversal indicator). Recommend obtaining sma_8 or clarifying uptrend confirmation method.
